explanation: Body is 337 words — exceeds the rubric's 300-word hard ceiling. Content quality is otherwise strong (specific version numbers, model retirement dates, flag names; bold leads name the actual changes), but the word count is a hard fail. The agent should condense the Claude Code 2.1.x section, which spans many small features that don't all need to be enumerated, to bring the body under 300 words.

criteria.name: Word count is between 80 and 300 words
criteria.evidence: Body is 337 words; the 300-word hard ceiling is exceeded.
